title: Review Artifact
description: Canonical schema for review artifacts produced by any reviewer (Claude, automated system, or human). Every review must record its source, scope, structured findings, and recommendations. Reviews may optionally link to downstream work items.

source.description: Who or what produced this review: a Claude AI agent, an automated system, or a human reviewer.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this review was generated or finalised.

repo.description: Repository reviewed in owner/name format (e.g. nicklasorte/spectrum-systems).

scope.description: Short description of the review scope (e.g. 'governance architecture', 'evaluation contracts').

findings.description: Ordered list of findings discovered during the review.

recommendations.description: Actionable recommendations derived from the findings.

related_work_items.description: Optional list of work item IDs generated from or linked to this review.

source_artifact.description: Optional relative path to the human-readable markdown companion for this review.

category.description: Thematic grouping (e.g. governance, evaluation, automation, process).

description.description: Full description of the finding including context and impact.

files_affected.description: Paths or components affected by this finding.

priority.description: Optional priority classification for this recommendation.
